summary: The build failed while attempting to download a nydus release artifact from GitHub: wget returned HTTP 502 and the buildx/bake solve aborted, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: A network/download error occurred: wget returned HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway when fetching the nydus release from GitHub, causing the build step to fail and buildx bake to abort.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows wget encountered an HTTP 502 when trying to download a remote resource.
The failed process is the wget command attempting to download the nydus release artifact.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH…
evidence.reason: Buildkit/buildx reported that the solve failed because the wget process failed.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$N…
evidence.reason: The GitHub Actions job step failed explicitly due to the failed wget-based step in buildx bake.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Ge…
evidence.reason: Additional debug output indicates fetch failures and request errors during image/layer fetching, supporting a transient/network retrieval issue.

suggested_fix: Retry the job (transient 502 may resolve). Verify the target URL and that the referenced release ($NYDUS_VERSION) exists on GitHub. If failures persist, add a retry/backoff for the wget step, cache or vendor the nydus binary in CI, or ensure network/proxy access to github.com from the CI runners.
